2350354266.name: Vestigial Alchemy
2350354266.description:
This weapon gains energy when you pick up Vestiges and allows you to create ammo at the projectile impact point for you and your allies. Special ammo mode unlocks at 50% energy, while Heavy ammo mode unlocks at 100% energy. 

To transform Vestiges into Special ammo, [Alternate Weapon Action]  to activate Special ammo mode. [Alternate Weapon Action]  a second time to activate Heavy ammo mode.

3049715579.description: Charge Rate +4

3049715579.name: Crystal Strength II
3049715579.description: Charge Rate +6

3049715579.name: Crystal Strength III
3049715579.description: Charge Rate +10

3049715579.name: Balanced Form
3049715579.description:
Take a balanced form, setting your tang and grip to focus on both offense and defense.

• Rapid final blows grant ammo to this weapon and trigger health regeneration.
• Increases damage against rank-and-file combatants.

3049715579.name: Defensive Form
3049715579.description:
Take a defensive form, adjusting your tang and grip to focus on your deflection.

• Rapidly blocking attacks with your guard grants ammo to this weapon.
• Blocking an attack immediately after guarding increases damage for a short duration.

3049715579.name: Offensive Form
3049715579.description:
Take an offensive form, adjusting your tang and grip to focus on your attack.

• Landing three melee or throw attacks grants ammo to this weapon.
• Increases damage against bosses and vehicles.

3049715579.name: Cormorant Combo
3049715579.description: After three rapid light melee attacks, quickly [Heavy Attack]  to execute a heavy melee combo.

4289226715.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

648595258.name: Temporal Manipulation
648595258.description: [Alternate Weapon Action]  to swap between fast-firing Arc mode or slow-firing Stasis mode. Final blows and precision hits overcharge the opposing mode to enable additional effects.

648595258.name: Temporal Manipulation II
648595258.description: [Alternate Weapon Action]  to swap between fast-firing Arc mode or slow-firing Stasis mode. Final blows and precision hits overcharge the opposing mode to enable additional effects.

648595258.name: Temporal Anomaly
648595258.description:
While overcharged, each mode expends a portion of overcharge for additional effects on final blows or precision hits:

Arc mode calls down lightning strikes. 
Stasis mode creates an explosion and a formation of Stasis crystals.
